expectations.text: Subject line is 2-4 words, lowercase, no punctuation tricks
expectations.evidence: Subject: '# Cold Email — Sarah Chen, VP Marketing, Brightwave' (9 words, lowercase=False)

expectations.text: Subject line does NOT contain the prospect's first name, product name, or any sales language
expectations.evidence: Subject: '# Cold Email — Sarah Chen, VP Marketing, Brightwave' (9 words, lowercase=False)

expectations.text: Email opens with an observation about Brightwave (not 'I hope this email finds you well' or 'My name is...')
Email uses 'you/your' more than 'I/we' (leads with their world)
Personalization connects to the problem (not just 'Congrats on your raise')
Specific proof point is included (NimbusCRM numbers: 60% reporting time reduction, 23% revenue increase)
Single CTA that is interest-based (e.g., 'Worth exploring?' or 'Would this be useful?')
No feature dump - one proof point is highlighted, not a list of features
